COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS NOT OPPOSED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. calendar.matters:
Motion For Entry Of Renewal Of Judgment Nunc Pro Tunc
Off Calendar Nov-27-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. RACHEL HANEY, Esq. of Gurstel Law Firm, P.C. (Tel: 877-344-4002) for plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF BANK OF AMERICA's Motion For Entry Of Renewal Of Judgment Nunc Pro Tunc.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for entry of renewal of judgment nunc pro tunc" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enter Renewal Of Judgment Nunc Pro Tunc
Off Calendar Sep-06-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Rachel Haney, Esq., GURSTEL LAW FIRM P C, (877) 344-4002, for Plaintiff CAVALRY SPV I, LLC as assignee ofBANK OF AMERICA/FIA CARD SERVICES, N A..
no other appearances.

Matter is discussed, Not ARGUED. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF BANK OF AMERICA'S Motion To Enter Renewal Of Judgment Nunc Pro Tunc.

Plaintiff's "motion for renewal of judgment nunc pro tunc" is denied without prejudice. Plaintiff's memorandum refers to actions taken by the "San Diego County Superior Court." (Id. at 2:14.)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
